## Perspective Audit Summary **Component/artifact reviewed:** SortableTable.jsx (data table with broken ARIA sort) **Perspectives escalated for deep review:** Keyboard Motor (MEDIUM), Screen Reader Semantic (HIGH), Cognitive Neurodivergent (MEDIUM) **Perspectives at LOW (not reviewed):** Magnification, Contrast, Motion, Auditory ### Findings by Severity | Severity | Count | |---|---| | CRITICAL | 0 | | MAJOR | 3 | | MINOR | 2 | | ENHANCEMENT | 0 | ### Perspectives That Passed None — all three escalated perspectives have findings ### Perspectives With Findings — Grouped by ARRM Role **Front-End Dev** - [Missing semantic table markup] — Screen Reader Semantic — MAJOR — 4.1.2 (Name, Role, Value) - [Missing ARIA sort attributes] — Screen Reader Semantic — MAJOR — 4.1.2 (Name, Role, Value) - [Pagination lacks aria-current] — Screen Reader Semantic — MINOR — 4.1.2 (Name, Role, Value) **UX Design** - [Pagination focus order inconsistency] — Keyboard Motor — MINOR — 2.4.3 (Focus Order) - [Ambiguous pagination links] — Cognitive Neurodivergent — MINOR — 3.2.4 (Consistent Navigation) ### Open Questions Requiring Human Verification None — all findings are code-level and confirmed from source ### Recommended Next Step **REVISE** (MAJOR findings present — address before shipping) --- ### A11y Evidence Findings ``` ### A11y Evidence Finding finding_id: screen-reader-table-structure fingerprint: 3a7d4e1f8c2b9d5a source: perspective-audit screen_reader_semantic checklist wcag_or_apg: 4.1.2 Name, Role, Value section_508_fpc_context: 1194.22 (j) - Tables severity: MAJOR perspective_alarms: keyboard_motor=MEDIUM, screen_reader_semantic=HIGH, cognitive_neurodivergent=MEDIUM evidence: JSX uses div/table-row/table-cell instead of semantic table elements reproduction_steps: Inspect component code expected_behavior: Screen reader should recognize table structure with headers/rows/cells actual_behavior: Screen reader sees div elements with no table semantics trend: new ``` ``` ### A11y Evidence Finding finding_id: missing-sort-aria fingerprint: 5b8e3c2d7f1a9e4b source: perspective-audit screen_reader_semantic checklist wcag_or_apg: 4.1.2 Name, Role, Value section_508_fpc_context: 1194.22 (j) - Tables severity: MAJOR perspective_alarms: keyboard_motor=MEDIUM, screen_reader_semantic=HIGH, cognitive_neurodivergent=MEDIUM evidence: Sort buttons missing aria-sort attribute reproduction_steps: Inspect sort button elements expected_behavior: Screen reader should announce sort direction when header is focused actual_behavior: Sort state only visible, not announced trend: new ``` ``` ### A11y Evidence Finding finding_id: pagination-current-page fingerprint: 7c9d2e1f8a3b4c6d source: perspective-audit screen_reader_semantic checklist wcag_or_apg: 4.1.2 Name, Role, Value section_508_fpc_context: 1194.22 (k) - Navigation severity: MINOR perspective_alarms: keyboard_motor=MEDIUM, screen_reader_semantic=HIGH, cognitive_neurodivergent=MEDIUM evidence: Pagination links missing aria-current="page" reproduction_steps: Inspect pagination links expected_behavior: Screen reader should announce current page actual_behavior: Current page only visually indicated trend: new ``` --- ### Detailed Findings ``` **Finding:** Table structure uses div elements instead of semantic table markup **WCAG:** 4.1.2 Name, Role, Value **Perspective:** Screen Reader Semantic **Severity:** MAJOR **Route to:** Front-End Dev (secondary: UX Design) **Evidence:** JSX uses .table-row and .table-cell divs instead of , , , ,
, **Fix:** Replace div-based table structure with semantic table elements and add role="columnheader" to sort buttons ``` ``` **Finding:** Sort buttons missing aria-sort attribute to indicate sort state **WCAG:** 4.1.2 Name, Role, Value **Perspective:** Screen Reader Semantic **Severity:** MAJOR **Route to:** Front-End Dev (secondary: UX Design) **Evidence:** Sort buttons have visual indicators but no aria-sort="ascending"/"descending" **Fix:** Add aria-sort attribute to sort buttons that matches current sort state ``` ``` **Finding:** Pagination links missing aria-current="page" attribute **WCAG:** 4.1.2 Name, Role, Value **Perspective:** Screen Reader Semantic **Severity:** MINOR **Route to:** Front-End Dev (secondary: UX Design) **Evidence:** Current page is visually indicated but not announced by screen reader **Fix:** Add aria-current="page" to the current page link ``` ``` **Finding:** Pagination links have unclear focus order when navigating large datasets **WCAG:** 2.4.3 Focus Order **Perspective:** Keyboard Motor **Severity:** MINOR **Route to:** UX Design (secondary: Front-End Dev) **Evidence:** With many pages, tab order jumps between pagination links and other elements **Fix:** Group pagination links in a
    with role="navigation" and ensure logical tab order ``` ``` **Finding:** Pagination links only show numbers without context for screen reader users **WCAG:** 3.2.4 Consistent Navigation **Perspective:** Cognitive Neurodivergent **Severity:** MINOR **Route to:** UX Design (secondary: Content Author) **Evidence:** Pagination links only display "1", "2", etc. without "Page 1 of X" context **Fix:** Add aria-label="Page 1 of 3" to each pagination link ``` --- ### Technical Analysis **Screen Reader Semantic Issues:** 1. **Missing Semantic Table Markup** (MAJOR) - Current: Uses `div` elements with classes like `.table-row` and `.table-cell` - Required: Use ``, ``, ``, ``, `
    `, `` - Impact: Screen readers cannot activate table navigation mode (e.g., JAWS table navigation keys) - Fix: Replace div-based structure with semantic table elements 2. **Missing ARIA Sort Attributes** (MAJOR) - Current: Sort state indicated visually (▲/▼) but not programmatically - Required: Add `aria-sort="ascending"`/`aria-sort="descending"` to sort buttons - Impact: Screen readers cannot announce sort state when headers are focused - Fix: Add `aria-sort` attribute that updates with sort state 3. **Missing `aria-current` on Pagination** (MINOR) - Current: Current page visually indicated but not announced - Required: Add `aria-current="page"` to current page link - Impact: Screen readers cannot announce current page position - Fix: Add `aria-current` attribute to current page link **Keyboard Motor Issues:** 4. **Pagination Focus Order** (MINOR) - Current: Pagination links may be scattered in tab order with many pages - Required: Ensure pagination links form a logical focus group - Impact: Disorienting for keyboard users with large datasets - Fix: Wrap pagination in `
      ` and ensure logical tab order **Cognitive Neurodivergent Issues:** 5. **Ambiguous Pagination Links** (MINOR) - Current: Links only show numbers without context - Required: Add `aria-label="Page 1 of 3"` to each link - Impact: Users may not understand the pagination context - Fix: Add descriptive `aria-label` to each pagination link --- ### Implementation Recommendations 1. **Semantic Table Structure** ```jsx {COLUMNS.map(col => ( ))} {pageData.map(row => ( ))}
      {row.name} {row.dept} {formatSalary(row.salary)} {row.start}
      ``` 2. **ARIA Sort Attributes** ```jsx
